source: CardInsider extraction pipeline (v3.1.1 baseline + is_travel curation preserved)
_note: Foundation rebuilt from cleaner v3.1.1 baseline. Removed 44 stub card entries, 196 phantom rules, and ~2,300 duplicate rules from cardexpert/finology/technofino sources that v4 had multiplied. is_travel flag preserved on 81 of the 82 cards (1 lost was a stub). redemption_rules placeholder added to schema for future enrichment.
